## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format lib test example/lib example/test`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `cd example && flutter test`
- [ ] `cd example && flutter build ios --simulator` for native iOS changes

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Public API changes include Dart documentation and tests.
- [ ] User-visible changes are reflected in the example and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a short recording.
- [ ] No generated build output, secrets, or personal data are included.
